description:
IMPORTANT: This is atari-go! The first to capture, no matter what, immediately wins.

To preserve my sanity, I have not added all the possible variations for starting multiple ladders at a time, so don't discontinue a ladder and continue it later.

This problem was quite complicated, so if I'm missing a correct variation please comment. Also, I wasn't sure of what incorrect variations to add so if you would like me to add one, commment as well.
